description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:18.04 Docker image. Define a single stage called build and a job named build that runs in this stage. In the before_script, run apt update, then install make cmake libboost-filesystem-dev flex bison gcc g++ git gengetopt bzip2 libdouble-conversion-dev software-properties-common tzdata, and run ldconfig. In the script, create a build directory, cd into it, run cmake .., then make -j4 -O, then make rtest. After the script, run a series of commands to capture the current git revision, clone the ztsdb_dockerfile repository, prepend a comment with the commit URL to the Dockerfile, configure git user name and email, commit the changes with a message containing the revision URL, and push to GitHub using the GITHUB_PWD secret.
